name: Spicy Star Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the margarine, honey, sugar, and eggs together in a bowl until smooth and fluffy.
2. Add the remaining ingredients and mix well.
3. Divide the dough into thirds.
4. Flatten each one into a circle that is 1/2 inch thick.
5. Refrigerate overnight until firm.
6. Remove the dough from the refrigerator and roll out on a lightly floured surface to 1/8 inch thick.
7. Cut out the dough with a star cookie cutter and place on a lightly oiled baking sheet.
8. Bake in a 375°F oven for 8 to 10 minutes, or until lightly browned.
9. One serving of 2 cookies = 78 calories.
Note: These cookies have approximately 3/4 teaspoon of sugar per 2 cookies.
